title: fix bug in .dockerignore support
body:
my former PR #1403 didn't take into account the directory path in .dockerignore. `buildah bud` should be able to exclude the whole folder and keep some files under the folder according to the patterns in .dockerignore.

```
// .dockerignore
test*
!*/test1*
```
should exclude `./testdir/test2.txt` but copy `./testdir/test1.txt`

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>
